lines.english: Maaroo, Third Mehl:
By the Hukam of His Command, He created attachment to Maya.
The Formless Lord created the universe of form.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮਾਈ ਤ੍ਰੈ ਗੁਣ ਪਰਸੂਤਿ ਜਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa maaee trai gun parasoot jamaaeaa |
lines.english: Maya, the mother, gave birth to the three gunas, the three qualities,

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਖੇਲ ਕਰੇ ਸਭਿ ਕਰਤਾ ਸੁਣਿ ਸਾਚਾ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਇਦਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aape khel kare sabh karataa sun saachaa man vasaaeidaa |1|
lines.english: The Creator Himself stages all the plays; hearing of the True Lord, enshrine Him in your mind. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਰ੍ਹੇ ਮਾਹ ਵਾਰ ਥਿਤੀ ਕਰਿ ਇਸੁ ਜਗ ਮਹਿ ਸੋਝੀ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: varhe maah vaar thitee kar is jag meh sojhee paaeidaa |2|
lines.english: Creating the years, months, days and dates, He infused intelligence into the world. ||2||
and proclaimed the four Vedas to Brahma.
Service to the Guru is the most excellent action.
Enshrine the Lord's Name within your heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਬਾਣੀ ਵਰਤੀ ਜਗ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਇਸੁ ਬਾਣੀ ਤੇ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: gurabaanee varatee jag antar is baanee te har naam paaeidaa |3|
lines.english: The Word of the Guru's Bani prevails throughout the world; through this Bani, the Lord's Name is obtained. ||3||
He reads the Vedas, but he starts arguments night and day.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਸਦਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਏ ਤ੍ਰੈ ਗੁਣ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਇਦਾ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: doojai bhaae sadaa dukh paae trai gun bharam bhulaaeidaa |4|
lines.english: In the love of duality, he suffers in pain forever; he is deluded by doubt, and confused by the three gunas. ||4||
He does not remember the Naam, the Name of the Lord; he is bound and gagged by the Messenger of Death.
The Gurmukh is in love with the One Lord alone;
he submerges in his mind the three-phased desire.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਦਾ ਹੈ ਮੁਕਤਾ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਚੁਕਾਇਦਾ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: saachai sabad sadaa hai mukataa maaeaa mohu chukaaeidaa |5|
lines.english: Through the True Word of the Shabad, he is liberated forever; he renounces emotional attachment to Maya. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਧੁਰਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਸੇ ਹੁਣਿ ਰਾਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: jo dhur raate se hun raate |
lines.english: Those who are so pre-ordained to be imbued, are imbued with love for the Lord.
By Guru's Grace, they are intuitively intoxicated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿ ਸਦਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਆਪੈ ਆਪੁ ਮਿਲਾਇਦਾ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: satigur sev sadaa prabh paaeaa aapai aap milaaeidaa |6|
lines.english: Serving the True Guru forever, they find God; He Himself unites them with Himself. ||6||
In attachment to Maya and doubt, the Lord is not found.
Attached to the love of duality, one suffers in pain.
So color this mind in the Fear and the Love of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਹਾ ਰੰਗੁ ਦਿਨ ਥੋੜੇ ਹੋਵੈ ਇਸੁ ਜਾਦੇ ਬਿਲਮ ਨ ਲਾਇਦਾ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: soohaa rang din thorre hovai is jaade bilam na laaeidaa |7|
lines.english: The crimson color lasts for only a few days; all too soon, it fades away. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੈ ਭਾਗਿ ਕੋ ਇਹੁ ਰੰਗੁ ਪਾਏ ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਰੰਗੁ ਚੜਾਇਦਾ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: poorai bhaag ko ihu rang paae guramatee rang charraaeidaa |8|
lines.english: By perfect destiny, some may obtain this color. Through the Guru's Teachings, this color is applied. ||8||
Dyed in this color, one merges in the True Lord.
The self-willed manmukhs take great pride in themselves.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜੈ ਲਾਗੇ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ਬਿਨੁ ਬੂਝੇ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: doojai laage janam gavaaeaa bin boojhe dukh paaeidaa |9|
lines.english: Attached to duality, they waste their lives; without understanding, they suffer in pain. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਗਹ ਕਬ ਹੀ ਨ ਪਾਵੈ ਮਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: daragah kab hee na paavai maan |
lines.english: In the Court of the Lord, they are never honored.
By Guru's Grace, one is united in the Lord's Union.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸਚਾ ਵਾਪਾਰਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਮੋਲਕੁ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: sachaa prabh sachaa vaapaaraa naam amolak paaeidaa |10|
lines.english: God is True, and True is His trade, through which the priceless Naam is obtained. ||10||
My God has hidden Himself deep within the self.
My Lord and Master has worked His handiwork.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸੁ ਕਾਇਆ ਕੀ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਕਿਨੈ ਨ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: eis kaaeaa kee keemat kinai na paaee |
lines.english: No one has found this body's value.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਸੁ ਕਾਇਆ ਸੋਧੈ ਆਪਹਿ ਆਪੁ ਮਿਲਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: guramukh hovai su kaaeaa sodhai aapeh aap milaaeidaa |11|
lines.english: One who becomes Gurmukh purifies his body, and then the Lord unites him with Himself. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਇਆ ਵਿਚਿ ਤੋਟਾ ਕਾਇਆ ਵਿਚਿ ਲਾਹਾ ॥
lines.translit: kaaeaa vich tottaa kaaeaa vich laahaa |
lines.english: Within the body, one loses, and within the body, one wins.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਵਣਜਿ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਏ ਸਹਜੇ ਸਹਜਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: guramukh vanaj sadaa sukh paae sahaje sehaj milaaeidaa |12|
lines.english: The Gurmukh trades, and finds peace forever; he intuitively merges in the Celestial Lord. ||12||
The Gurmukh seeks the self-sustaining Lord.
True is the Lord's Mansion, and True is His treasure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਾਲਾਹੇ ਸੁਖਦਾਤੇ ਮਨਿ ਮੇਲੇ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: guramukh saalaahe sukhadaate man mele keemat paaeidaa |13|
lines.english: The Gurmukh praises the Giver of peace; his mind is united with the Lord, and he comes to know His worth. ||13||
The Great Giver Himself gives.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਇਆ ਵਿਚਿ ਵਸਤੁ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਨਹੀ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: kaaeaa vich vasat keemat nahee paaee |
lines.english: Within the body is the object; its value cannot be estimated.
He Himself grants glorious greatness to the Gurmukh.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਦਾ ਹਟੁ ਸੋਈ ਵਥੁ ਜਾਣੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਦੇਇ ਨ ਪਛੋਤਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: jis daa hatt soee vath jaanai guramukh dee na pachhotaaeidaa |14|
lines.english: He alone knows this object, to whom this store belongs; the Gurmukh is blessed with it, and does not come to regret. ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਸਭ ਮਹਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਮਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: har jeeo sabh meh rahiaa samaaee |
lines.english: The Dear Lord is pervading and permeating all.
By Guru's Grace, He is found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਏ ਆਪੇ ਸਬਦੇ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: aape mel milaae aape sabade sehaj samaaeidaa |15|
lines.english: He Himself unites in His Union; through the Word of the Shabad, one intuitively merges with Him. ||15||
